verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Front as a shared inbox and customer communication platform for teams, which aligns with the recorded description.
The URL for authentication methods resulted in a FETCH_ERROR, preventing confirmation of the claim.
The Help Center confirms that developers can create personal API tokens without needing human approval or a paid plan.
The developer portal lists the Core API as REST and provides extensive documentation on various product objects.
The existence of public documentation and self-serve token creation supports the claim that the API is buildable today.
